center.name: 奥地利
center.summary: 奥地利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括長尾林鴞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In mainland Europe, its modern distribution is quite spotty, with the species being found in central Europe in southeastern Germany, central and eastern areas of the Czech Republic, southern Austria, all but western Slovenia, and spottily but broadly in several areas of western, southern and northeastern Poland.Uitz, M
